rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: Email Forwarding Rule - Suspicious Rule Names

rules.rule_text:
title: Email Forwarding Rule - Suspicious Rule Names
id: 47ea2a13-f863-4403-a672-00b3d940ac92
status: experimental
description: "Detects the creation of email forwarding rules with suspicious names.\
  \ Part of the \nRedCanary 2024 Threat Detection Report.\n"
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/techniques/email-forwarding-rule/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2024/03/21
tags:
- attack.collection
- attack.t1114
- attack.t1114.003
logsource:
  service: exchange
  product: m365
detection:
  selection_rule:
    Workload: Exchange
    Operation:
    - New-InboxRule
    - Set-InboxRule
  selection_onechar:
    RuleName|re: ^\w{1}$
  selection_susp_vals:
    RuleName:
    - .
    - ..
    - aaaaa
    - "\u2026\u2026"
    - ;
  condition: selection_rule and (selection_onechar or selection_susp_vals)
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
